title: Democrats and Republicans agree: AI is scary
abstract: Democrats and Republicans agree: AI is scary may be niche, but it solves its target problem with focus and precision. In the fast-moving AI space, specialized tools often outperform general platfor...
abstract_zh: 两党共识：AI真吓人！但别怕，这工具专治各种“智能焦虑”，精准到让人汗毛倒竖。快来看看，是时候给你的数据喂点“算法鸡汤”了！
